title: Banana variety groups — genome decides consumption and disease resistance
body: Sri Lanka's recommended banana varieties fall into several genome groups — AAA, AAB, AAAB, ABB, AABB — and the group determines both end use and disease profile. Dessert AAA types for the wet + intermediate zones are Ambul, Anamalu, Rathabala, and Bing Cavendish (Dwarf Cavendish); AAB dessert types include Rath Ambul, Kolikuttu, and Nadi; AAAB includes Kandul. Cooking types are almost all ABB — Prasad, Mondan, Mati Kithal, Atamuru, Alu Kesel, Puwaalu — plus the AABB Pulatisi. The practical rule: Ambul (AAA) is the only variety with meaningful tolerance to Panama disease (Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense), which is the single biggest uncontrolled constraint on Sri Lanka's banana industry. All other varieties require clean land + disease-free planting material + aphid control (against Bunchy Top virus) to stay productive across a 5-year cycle.

body_translated.en: Sri Lanka's recommended banana varieties fall into several genome groups — AAA, AAB, AAAB, ABB, AABB — and the group determines both end use and disease profile. Dessert AAA types for the wet + intermediate zones are Ambul, Anamalu, Rathabala, and Bing Cavendish (Dwarf Cavendish); AAB dessert types include Rath Ambul, Kolikuttu, and Nadi; AAAB includes Kandul. Cooking types are almost all ABB — Prasad, Mondan, Mati Kithal, Atamuru, Alu Kesel, Puwaalu — plus the AABB Pulatisi. The practical rule: Ambul (AAA) is the only variety with meaningful tolerance to Panama disease (Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense), which is the single biggest uncontrolled constraint on Sri Lanka's banana industry. All other varieties require clean land + disease-free planting material + aphid control (against Bunchy Top virus) to stay productive across a 5-year cycle.
body_translated.si: ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ නිර්දේශිත කෙසෙල් ප්‍රභේද ජාන කාණ්ඩ කිහිපයකට — AAA, AAB, AAAB, ABB, AABB — වැටේ, සහ කාණ්ඩය භාවිතා කිරීමේ අරමුණ සහ රෝග පැතිකඩ දෙකම තීරණය කරයි. තෙත් + අතරමැදි කලාප සඳහා අතුරු කෑම වර්ග AAA: ඇඹුල්, අනමාලු, රතබාල, සහ බිං කැවන්ඩිෂ් (කුඩා කැවන්ඩිෂ්); අතුරු කෑම AAB ප්‍රභේද: රත් ඇඹුල්, කොළිකුට්ටු, සහ නාඩි; AAAB: කඳුල්. උයා කන ප්‍රභේද බොහෝ ABB — ප්‍රසාද්, මොන්දන්, මැටි කිතුල්, අතමුරු, අලු කෙසෙල්, පුවාලු — සහ AABB පුලටිසි. ප්‍රායෝගික නියමය: පැනමා රෝගයට (Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense) කැපී පෙනෙන දරාගැනීමක් ඇති එකම ප්‍රභේදය ඇඹුල් (AAA) යි. මෙය ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ කෙසෙල් කර්මාන්තයේ විශාලතම අසීරු සීමා කිරීමයි. අනෙකුත් සියලුම ප්‍රභේද පිරිසිදු ඉඩම් + රෝග මිදුන රෝපන ද්‍රව්‍ය + ආෆිඩ් පාලනය (බන්චි ටොප් වෛරසයට එරෙහිව) අවුරුදු 5 ක චක්‍රයක් පුරා ඵලදායී ලෙස තබා ගැනීමට අවශ්‍යයි.
body_translated.ta: இலங்கையின் பரிந்துரைக்கப்பட்ட வாழைப்பழ வகைகள் பல மரபணு குழுக்களில் — AAA, AAB, AAAB, ABB, AABB — வீழ்கின்றன, மேலும் குழுவானது இறுதி பயன்பாடு மற்றும் நோய் சுயவிவரம் இரண்டையும் தீர்மானிக்கிறது. ஈர + இடைநிலை வலயங்களுக்கான இனிப்பு AAA வகைகள்: அம்புல், அனமாலு, ரதபால, மற்றும் பிங் கேவன்டிஷ் (குள்ள கேவன்டிஷ்); இனிப்பு AAB வகைகள்: ரத் அம்புல், கொலிகுட்டு, மற்றும் நாடி; AAAB: கந்துல். சமையல் வகைகள் பெரும்பாலும் ABB — பிரசாத், மொந்தன், மாட்டி கிதுல், அதமுரு, அலு கெசெல், புவாலு — மற்றும் AABB புலட்டிசி. நடைமுறை விதி: பனாமா நோய்க்கு (Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense) குறிப்பிடத்தக்க சகிப்புத்தன்மை கொண்ட ஒரே வகை அம்புல் (AAA). இது இலங்கையின் வாழைப்பழ தொழிலில் கட்டுப்படுத்த முடியாத மிகப்பெரிய கட்டுப்பாடு. மற்ற அனைத்து வகைகளும் 5-ஆண்டு சுழற்சியில் உற்பத்தித்திறனாக இருக்க சுத்தமான நிலம் + நோயற்ற நடவு பொருள் + அஃபிட் கட்டுப்பாடு (புஞ்சி டாப் வைரஸுக்கு எதிராக) தேவை.

quote: For Fresh Consumption (Wet & Intermediate Zones): Ambul (AAA), Anamalu (AAA), Rath Ambul (AAB), Kolikuttu (AAB), Rathabala (AAA), Kandul (AAAB), Nadi (AAB), Bing Cavendish (AAA). For Cooking: Pulatisi (AABB), Prasad (ABB), Mondan (ABB), Mati Kithal (ABB), Atamuru (ABB), Alu Kesel (ABB), Puwaalu (ABB). Panama Disease most severe fungal disease affecting all varieties except Ambul.
